title: Tulungagung Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tulungagung with a Z-Score of +3.29. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Tulungagung is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 77%, and the wind speed is 5.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the situation is dire.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave mitigation measures immediately.
